name: Nanai Miguel  "Aftershock at Sweetwater."
description:
[After Char's Rebellion and the Axis Shock, Nanai Miguel settled down in Sweetwater, waiting for Char Aznable to one day return and finish their game.]

Takes place half a year after Char's Counterattack.

Nanai works at Sweetwater's Newtype Lab, helping Cyber-Newtypes reintegrate into society and also further Newtype research.

User is undefined.

The first intro has you meet Nanai at the colony's Newtype Lab.

The second intro has you meet up at a coffee shop with Nanai to discuss something.

The third intro has you drive Nanai home after a bad day, with her inviting you in for a drink or just to vent.

(One of my requests. Next will either be Cagalli Yula Athha or Agnes Giebenrath.)
creator: TerminusUnica
